name: StatusDashboard
description: A system status dashboard showing service health, uptime indicators, and incident history. Ideal for status pages, monitoring agents, and infrastructure overviews.

visual.description: Header with overall status indicator. Grid of service cards each showing name, status dot (green/yellow/red), uptime percentage, and last check time. Below, a timeline of recent incidents.

props.name: services
props.description: Array of service objects with name, status (operational|degraded|down), uptime, lastChecked

props.name: incidents
props.description: Array of incident objects with title, status, timestamp, description
